title: Summary: Turn 865
content: Knowledgebase design: add `category` (hierarchical with `/`) and `tags` to Notion model. Export each notion as a `.md` file with frontmatter; relations become `[[wikilinks]]`; generate MOC `_index.md` per directory. Implement in `com.knowledge.obsidian` (renderer, index builder, exporter). Integrate as optional pipeline step; roadmap: Phase1 model enhancement, Phase2 export engine, Phase3 integration, Phase4 HTTP API.
